Name: Telemetry to minimum (Required)
Desc: Reduces background data collection/upload by DiagTrack and friends.

Name: Start-menu ads & suggestions off
Desc: Kills content-delivery background fetches for Start-menu suggestions.

Name: Search-box web content off
Desc: Search box stops phoning home for web suggestions.

Name: Cross-device experiences off
Desc: Stops Connected Devices Platform chatter. Windows Update deletes this key — audit re-checks.

Name: Teams taskbar button hidden
Desc: Removes the preloaded Chat/Teams taskbar surface.

Name: Delivery Optimization P2P off
Desc: Your PC stops seeding Windows updates to strangers (upload bandwidth + disk I/O).

Name: Widgets / news feed off (policy)
Desc: Disables the news/widgets pipeline. App removal itself is item 2A.3.

Name: Disable 10 telemetry/compat-census tasks
Desc: CEIP, Compatibility Appraiser, Siuf feedback, WER upload, Maps toast, CloudExperienceHost. Skips TrustedInstaller-protected SdbinstMergeDbTask; never touches \Shell\CreateObjectTask.

Name: Remove Edge autolaunch from startup
Desc: Edge re-adds a MicrosoftEdgeAutoLaunch_* Run entry after updates.
Target: no MicrosoftEdgeAutoLaunch_* value in HKCU Run

Name: Block Edge startup boost (policy)
Desc: Stops Edge preloading itself at logon. WebView2 security updates stay enabled.

Name: Block Edge background mode (policy)
Desc: No Edge processes lingering after you close the browser.

Name: NTFS last-access updates off
Desc: One less metadata write per file read.

Name: Larger NTFS metadata cache
Desc: Fewer metadata disk hits. Needs a reboot to take effect.

Name: SSD TRIM enabled (verify)
Desc: TRIM keeps SSD write performance healthy.

Name: NIC power-saving property cluster off
Desc: Energy-Efficient Ethernet / Green Ethernet / Power Saving Mode / Gigabit Lite / Wake-on-pattern cause micro-stutter and latency spikes. Only properties that exist on your adapter are touched. Applying resets the adapter ~2s — never runs mid-game.

Name: "Allow computer to turn off this device" off
Desc: OS-initiated NIC power-down causes stutter. Applied via the MSPower_DeviceEnable CIM method (the only one that actually works); verified via Get-NetAdapterPowerManagement, never via the CIM re-read (it lies).

Name: USB selective suspend off
Desc: Prevents input-device latency/wake hitches.
Target: AC setting = 0 on active power scheme

Name: PCIe link-state power management off
Desc: GPU PCIe link never down-clocks into a latency penalty.

Name: Mouse acceleration off
Desc: Raw 1:1 aim — Enhance Pointer Precision disabled.

Name: MMCSS gaming profile
Desc: Network throttling off + games get a fair CPU share from the multimedia scheduler.

Name: Hardware-accelerated GPU Scheduling on
Desc: Offloads scheduling to the GPU instead of Windows — recommended for modern GPUs/drivers. Takes effect after reboot.

Name: DiagTrack → Disabled
Desc: Connected User Experiences & Telemetry — the main telemetry collector.

Name: SysMain → Disabled
Desc: Superfetch/prefetch — no benefit on SSD-only systems.

Name: WerSvc → Disabled
Desc: Windows Error Reporting upload.

Name: Fax → Disabled
Desc: Fax. It is not 1996.

Name: RetailDemo → Disabled
Desc: Store-shelf demo mode.

Name: RemoteRegistry → Disabled
Desc: Remote registry editing — disabling is a security win too.

Name: MapsBroker → Disabled
Desc: Offline maps sync.

Name: WMPNetworkSvc → Disabled
Desc: Media Player network sharing.

Name: PhoneSvc → Disabled
Desc: Phone Link backend. Guard: prompts at apply-time if Phone Link is used.

Name: lfsvc → Disabled
Desc: Geolocation. Guard: prompts at apply-time (some apps want location).

Name: Spooler → Disabled (printer-guarded)
Desc: Print spooler. Auto-guard: skipped entirely if a real printer is installed.
Target: StartMode = Disabled (or skip if printer present)

Name: CDPSvc → Disabled
Desc: Connected Devices Platform service (pairs with 1.4).

Name: DusmSvc → Disabled
Desc: Data usage metering.

Name: SharedAccess → Disabled
Desc: Internet Connection Sharing. Guard: prompts — Mobile Hotspot/VPN sharing need it (Manual offered instead).

Name: WSAIFabricSvc → Disabled
Desc: Windows AI Fabric — no AI features on a gaming rig.

Name: LanmanServer → Disabled
Desc: SMB share HOSTING. Guard: prompts — breaks sharing folders to other devices (NAS client access unaffected).

Name: PcaSvc → Manual
Desc: Program Compatibility Assistant → Manual. Windows Update flips it back — audit re-checks.

Name: DoSvc (Delivery Optimization) → Manual
Desc: Set-Service is Access-Denied on this service — the registry Start value is edited directly (3 = Manual).

Name: Anticheat/launcher services → Manual (never Disabled)
Desc: EABackgroundService, EAAntiCheatService, BEService, EasyAntiCheat: Disabled silently breaks game launches (verified with EA titles); Manual keeps them dormant until their game runs. Riot vgc/vgk are deliberately excluded (managed separately).

Name: Remove Microsoft AI Manager (aimgr)
Desc: Background AI component. Windows Update reinstalls it — audit re-flags.

Name: Remove Copilot
Desc: No AI assistant processes on a gaming rig.

Name: Fully remove Widgets apps
Desc: WebExperience + WidgetsPlatformRuntime. After removal the Settings "Widgets" toggle disappears — expected.

Name: OEM vendor bloat sweep (report-only)
Desc: Lists known OEM utility leftovers; never auto-removes — each is a per-item prompt at apply-time.

Name: NVIDIA container services (report-only)
Desc: NvContainerLocalSystem/NVDisplay.ContainerLocalSystem host real driver-settings functionality, not just telemetry — never auto-disabled, informational only.

Name: Disk write caching ON for all fixed disks
Desc: Found silently OFF on the reference rig — a large invisible I/O penalty. Missing value = Windows default (on). Needs reboot; re-verify after driver/Windows updates.

Name: Hibernation + Fast Startup off
Desc: Frees hiberfil.sys (GBs) and avoids stale-driver Fast Startup states. Guard: prompts on laptops.

Name: Storage Sense off
Desc: No surprise background cleanups mid-game; clean manually instead.

Name: System Restore shadow storage capped at 10 GB
Desc: Bounds background VSS disk usage while keeping restore points. Requires elevation to read.

Name: Spectre/Meltdown mitigations OFF
Desc: TRADE-OFF: ~1-3% CPU-bound gain for disabled speculative-execution hardening. Personal gaming rig decision only. Major Windows updates can re-enable — audit re-checks.

Name: VBS / Memory Integrity / Hyper-V OFF
Desc: TRADE-OFF: several % FPS for losing HVCI, Credential Guard, WSL2, Hyper-V, Windows Sandbox. Guard: refuses to apply if WSL2/Docker detected. Note: "Microsoft Hypervisor Service: Degraded" afterward is benign (= off on purpose).
Target: VBS status 0, hypervisorlaunchtype Off, HVCI Enabled = 0

Name: Defender scheduled scans OFF (real-time stays ON)
Desc: Background full scans tank frame times mid-game. Real-time + tamper protection are NEVER touched. Windows Update resets the schedule — audit re-checks. Compensation: on-demand quick scans.

Name: Defender exclusions for game folders (review)
Desc: Eliminates on-access scan stutter on game assets. Steam libraries auto-detected; every folder is a per-item prompt. HARD RULE: never excludes Temp, profile roots, or drive roots. Apply is deliberately not implemented — human review required.
Target: game folders excluded, nothing dangerous excluded

Name: MSI interrupt mode for GPU + NIC
Desc: Message-signaled interrupts = lower interrupt latency than legacy line-based. Most modern devices already use MSI — only offered if actually off.
Target: MSISupported = 1 for GPU and active NIC
